title: Runner Bean Curry
description: A simple and flavorful curry recipe made with runner beans, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the curry powder and cumin, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the runner beans and stir to coat with the spice mixture.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 15-20 minutes, or until the beans are tender.
Serve hot with steamed rice or naan bread.
